rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior loyalty-reward research, and the cited paper is a core loyalty-program/retention study with dynamic cumulative reward mechanisms that are conceptually close to the citing paper’s reward-architecture focus.
